---
title: Marimo-quarto
toc: false
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/AlexandreDabySeesaram/marimo-quarto
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---



## Example of python in quarto 


here you'll find 

* An [example](salaries.qmd)
